title: P1 — Repository initialization
objective: Solution scaffold, Docker stack (api/web/keycloak/sqlserver/seq/minio), CI skeleton.

title: P2 — Backend foundation
objective: Modular-monolith host + the Membership reference-module pattern.

title: P3 — Frontend foundation
objective: App shell, design tokens, i18n EN/AR + right-to-left, role-filtered navigation.

title: P4 — Identity & permissions
objective: Claim-to-role mapping, policy + attribute-based authorization, segregation of duties, Users & Membership UI.

title: P5 — Topics & backlog
objective: Intake, triage and backlog; multiple views; drag-and-drop prioritization.

title: P6 — Agenda & meetings
objective: Agenda building and meeting management, plus the in-app notification centre.

title: P7 — Minutes & decisions
objective: Minutes of meeting lifecycle and the decision record.

title: P8 — Actions & follow-up
objective: Action tracking including Hangfire reminders, the Job Monitor, and the decision-link gate.

title: P9 — Voting
objective: The voting engine, including the P1–P9 audit remediation and the hash-chained audit store.

title: P10 — Risks, dependencies & traceability
objective: Risk and dependency registers, the typed traceability graph, the impact graph, and risk/dependency reports.

title: P11 — ADRs & invariants
objective: The Governance module: ADR repository, invariant registry, and decision-to-ADR promotion.

title: P12 — Dashboards & reports
objective: Role dashboards and the reports surface.

title: P13 — Webex adapter
objective: Webex notifications and recording links, strictly behind the INotificationChannel seam (DW-002 / D-02). Includes manual recording upload with presigned playback.

title: P14 — Tarseem diagram sidecar
objective: A Tarseem diagram render sidecar behind the IDiagramRenderer seam, plus the Diagrams surface (DW-011 / D-11). DEFERRED INDEFINITELY and removed from the active ladder by operator decision DEC-028 of 2026-07-17. Not built; the seam does not exist and the product ships with no in-product diagram renderer. Re-opened only by explicit operator instruction, with no automatic trigger. This slice correctly has zero progress entries because it was never built.

title: P15 — Research & Knowledge
objective: The standalone Research module plus the Knowledge wiki and templates. The Keystone research-mission import (FR-112) was deferred out of this slice to future work on 2026-07-12 (DW-005 / D-05) and was not built.

title: P16 — Security hardening
objective: An OWASP ASVS 5.0 L2 sweep, including per-ballot crypto chaining (DW-013 / D-13), CI security gates, and container hardening. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.

title: P17 — Testing hardening
objective: Harvest the testing deferrals accumulated in the progress log; partially advanced ahead of time by the S0–S7 coverage and end-to-end slices under ADR-0016. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.

title: P18 — Deployment
objective: Production compose with overrides, migration-on-deploy, nightly backups and warm-standby restore, and the deployment and rollback runbook. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.

title: P19 — Final audit & release readiness
objective: The release-gate checkpoints and the definition of done, plus the final acceptance-audit report. Returned a conditional no-go pending operator go-live actions rather than further build work. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.

title: P20 — Cloud landing zone & account hygiene
objective: Idempotent aws-cli scripts (deploy/aws/) — no Terraform/CDK (CON-003). IAM admin user + MFA and move off root; security group (443 + SSH-from-IP or SSM only); S3 recordings + backup buckets (Block Public Access, versioning, SSE-S3, AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload lifecycle); PER-ENVIRONMENT IAM users and instance roles; ECR repos; Route 53 records; AWS Budgets + spend actions (deny-IAM at 100%, auto-stop at 120%).

title: P21 — Cloud compose topology + Keycloak→SQL Server
objective: Standalone deploy/docker-compose.cloud.yml (base file untouched). KC_DB=mssql with guarded READ_COMMITTED_SNAPSHOT + keycloak_svc db_owner scoped to the keycloak DB; keycloak-init one-shot usable outside the prod overlay; MSSQL_PID=Express in both environments (DEF-014); delete minio/ngrok/postgres; CPU/RAM limits retuned for a 2 vCPU host; Seq emitters disabled where Seq is absent. Gated by U2 (prod-mode KC-on-mssql behind /kc/ + PKCE) and U3 (FTS under Express + Arabic word-breaker).

title: P22 — S3 file store
objective: U1 spike first (Minio SDK vs real S3: SigV4/region/multipart/presign; fallback AWSSDK.S3 behind IFileStore). Configurable bucket + region (DEF-015); denied-create tolerance in EnsureBucketAsync; CSP media-src matching the actual presign host; delete the nginx /acmp-recordings/ proxy; tests to hold the >=95% per-file coverage gate (MinioFileStore is no longer excluded).

title: P23 — Backup / restore / DR
objective: Drop WITH COMPRESSION (fails on Express); back up BOTH SQL databases (Acmp + keycloak); delete the pg_dump and mc-mirror legs; rewrite restore.sh (its psql-into-keycloak-db leg targets a deleted container); aws s3 cp backups with real credentials to the backup bucket; rollback + DATABASECHANGELOGLOCK-unwedge runbook. Verifies NFR-056/057/058.

title: P24 — CD pipeline (image publish + deploy)
objective: Net-new: no image-publish path exists today. GitHub OIDC → AWS role; buildx; ECR push; per-env web:<sha>-uat|prod tags; digest artefact consumed by promote.sh; a deploy mechanism for the compose/scripts/.env files to reach the box. Promotion moves a UAT-tested digest to production.

title: P25 — Environment provisioning & TLS
objective: bootstrap-instance.sh user-data (Docker, 50 GB disk, 4 GiB swap, ECR helper); Route 53 boot-updater systemd unit for on-demand UAT; certbot --dns-route53 (needs ListHostedZones + GetChange + ChangeResourceRecordSets; Persistent=true timer); SEPARATE cloud-only 443 nginx template (the shared template has no certs in dev/e2e); nginx deny on /kc/admin + master realm; launch with CpuCredits=standard.

title: P26 — Manual user seeding
objective: seed-users.sh + git-ignored users.csv, reusing the reconcile.sh kcadm pattern (docker compose run --rm; no new runtime dependency). Real users get a temporary password + UPDATE_PASSWORD (unlike the e2e seeder's fixed-password/no-required-actions users). Idempotent; no ACMP member rows created (ProvisionCurrentUser JIT-provisions on first login). Extend reconcile.sh to reconcile redirect URIs (realm import runs first-boot only).

title: P27 — Deployment testing & cutover
objective: smoke.sh (healthchecks, /api/healthz+/readyz, TLS+HSTS, S3 upload→presign→browser-GET→delete, KC login round-trip); the existing Playwright suite against UAT via E2E_WEB_URL/E2E_KEYCLOAK_URL; backup→restore 3→0→3 drill on both DBs on Express; digest promotion; AWS install + cutover runbook.
